title: Distributed Systems Engineer - Data Platform - Logs and Audit Logs
score_reasoning: This role delivers strong fit with London and Lisbon as hybrid options—both well within your Europe-based timezone preference (0–2 hours from Berlin). Your Go, SQL, distributed systems, and observability expertise (Prometheus, Grafana) align closely with the core technical requirements. The focus on building high-throughput, reliable data delivery and logging platform infrastructure matches your background in microservices, zero-downtime migrations, and observability implementation. Your demonstrated systems thinking and multi-team impact from the zero-downtime migration framework at Velox positions you well for the architectural ownership this role implies. The only notable gap is lack of production Kafka/Flink experience, though you have consumer experience and the posting lists this as 'strong plus', not core requirement.

red_flags: Kafka/Flink production experience listed as 'strong plus' but you only have consumer exposure
No evidence of logging platform or SIEM experience (Splunk, Datadog, Sumo Logic) in your CV
Kubernetes listed as 'plus', not core requirement
